Excellent Cooling & Great Performance by Daikin
Reviewed in India on 15 May 2026
Size: New Star Rated
Verified Purchase

I purchased the Daikin MTKL50XV16 Inverter Split AC from Amazon India⁠� and I am very satisfied with its performance. The cooling is very fast and powerful even in extreme heat. Within a few minutes, the room becomes properly cool.

The AC runs very smoothly and quietly, and the inverter technology helps in better power efficiency. Build quality also feels premium and the air throw is excellent. The PM2.5 filter is an added benefit for clean air.

Installation and overall experience were very good. Daikin is truly a reliable brand for air conditioners. Highly recommended for anyone looking for strong cooling and dependable performance.

RP
1 out of 5 stars
Completely unacceptable, poor cooling, overpriced installation and terrible support
Reviewed in India on 23 April 2026
Size: New Star Rated
Verified Purchase

I bought the Daikin MTKL50XV16 AC from Amazon and had it installed on 19 April 2026 by their authorized partner Ms Enterprises, Bangalore. What followed has been one of the worst purchase experiences I’ve had.

First, the installation charges were shockingly high, around ₹11,468 plus an additional ₹1,000 for drilling. It honestly felt like I was being taken advantage ofand ripped off.

Second, the installation quality itself was poor. The technicians did not seem careful or professional and the work did not inspire any confidence.

Now the main issue—the AC does not cool properly from day one. Even when set to 20°C, the room temperature doesn’t go below 28°C. That defeats the entire purpose of buying an AC, especially from a brand like Daikin which is supposed to be reliable. Also the ac noise levels are high, the quality is gone down to drain.

Customer support has made things worse. Calls get redirected to WhatsApp with no real resolution. There is no proper follow-up, no accountability, and no urgency.

At this point, I regret buying this product. Between poor performance, inflated installation costs, and weak after-sales support, this has been a very disappointing experience.

I would strongly advise potential buyers to think twice before purchasing this model—or at the very least, be extremely cautious about installation and service.

I am still waiting for a proper resolution from Daikin. If the company is serious about its reputation, they should step in and fix this immediately.

Shrey
1 out of 5 stars
Terrible Experience. Just Refrain from Buying. Will save you time and energy.
Reviewed in India on 1 May 2026
Size: New Star Rated
Verified Purchase

Terrible mistake buying the Daikin 1.5 Ton 3 Star AC.

Let me tell you my experience so you do not make the same mistake.

1) Installation scam. They quote you tremendously high - they said its a lot of work and materials are costly. Fair enough I'll Pay. But they do not have proper tools to do the job. No core drilling tool. Literally used a hammer drill to make a hole in my wall. No Copper pipe bending tool all done by hand very unprofessional. The stand they get is super cheap probably 500 But charged me 1200. Did not use cement to fill up the hold was escaping by stuffing the hole with foam from the box, when asked about it, he said - Do you have it? THIS WAS THE LEAST OF THE PROBLEMS.

2) Installation done - Turned on AC. After the compressor kicks in - Literally felt like a Helicopter was on my roof. Video attached for reference.

3) Called customer care - they sent over the same guy. Tightened the bolts attaching the outdoor unit to the stand and said problem solved.

4) Guess what, same issue. As soon as the compressor kicks in, Unit attempts to take off. I called the customer care and asked to send over another professional. The guy dismantles the Outdoor unit and says there is a fault in the compressor. They agreed for a compressor swap on a 2 day old unit. No replacement offered. I naturally declined as i do not want to mess with a new unit.

5) Called Amazon - they agreed for a refund. Return was scheduled. I got everything dismantled and packed it in a box. After a few days of the pickup - the app said the PACKAGE MAY BE LOST IN TRANSIT. No refund issued till now. I called the customer care (AMAZON) very helpful assured me about the refund but said to wait for 13 days as the seller has to review the package and then issue the refund.

6) After 3 weeks finally received the refund but lost about 4k for installation etc. Plus there is a hole in my wall this whole while.

Daikin this is not acceptable. I usually do not waste my time in posting reviews but this time they deserved my time and attention for a scathing review.

Very disappointed with the Samsung AC installation and after-sales service experience.

The installation technicians used low-quality, non-branded electrical wires, plugs, stand, and other accessories instead of proper branded materials. When questioned, they said the products mentioned in Samsung’s official pricing sheet were “not available” and insisted on charging higher prices for alternative items. They even asked us to buy materials ourselves if we were not satisfied.

The technician also appeared inexperienced and caused damage during installation.

What was even more frustrating was Samsung’s support after the complaint was raised. Despite multiple follow-up emails and escalations, every complaint was repeatedly assigned back to the same technician/service center that caused the issue in the first place. No proper action or resolution was provided.

Even after escalating to higher levels, the response from Samsung support was extremely disappointing. One of the representatives openly supported the technician by saying they “may charge more than the quoted sheet price,” but no one gave any explanation for:

Use of non-branded wires, plugs, and stand

Higher-than-official installation charges

Poor workmanship and damage caused

Overall, the product may be good, but the installation and service experience has been extremely poor. I expected much better professionalism and accountability from Samsung.

The best decision I made this summer...
Reviewed in India on 21 April 2025
Style Name: 2025 3 Star

I recently bought the Samsung AC, 1.5 ton, 3 star, from Amazon. I don’t usually write long reviews, but this purchase truly exceeded my expectations. I conducted a thorough research before buying my first AC and detailed reviews really helped me make the right choice. I thought of sharing my experience to help others in their decision making too.

If you’re looking for an AC that’s actually smart, cools efficiently, and saves on electricity bills, this is it.

Samsung actually delivers True AI, not just a gimmick like other brands- The AC learns my cooling habits and auto-adjusts the temperature, so I don’t even need to think about it.

It connects seamlessly to Wi-Fi, and I can control it through my phone, voice commands, or the SmartThings app. Whether I’m coming home from work or too lazy to reach for the remote, I can just tell Alexa or Google Assistant to turn it on.

Fast Cooling That Turns Heads - First time I switched it on, it cooled my room in minutes, even in peak summer heat. I had my friends over, and mid-conversation, one of them sitting in the corner desk actually asked, “Which AC is this? I can feel the cool air even till this corner of the room”. That’s when I knew I made the right choice. The 4-way swing turned out to be worth the hype. Whether I’m at my desk, on the bed, or near the window, I don’t feel any warm spots.

I was worried about a higher bill since due to rising heat, I have started using my AC for-almost 8 hours. But to my surprise, my electricity bills actually dropped significantly. The AI Energy mode optimizes the room temperature according to the weather conditions & constantly saves energy without sacrificing my comfort. I even check my power consumption and track my savings in real-time.

SmartThings App = Full Control in My Hands. Before this, I never thought I needed an app for my AC. Now? I can’t imagine using an AC without it. I turn it on/off, adjust temperature, set timer, track energy usage, all from my phone.

The AC arrived on time, and the installation was seamless. The engineer not only set it up quickly but also gave a full demo, ran quality checks, and even cleaned up after installation. Professional service makes a huge difference. Expected nothing less than Samsung!

Final Thoughts? Worth Every Penny! If you want an AC that’s smart, powerful, energy-efficient, and genuinely hassle-free, just go for this one. It’s hands down the best investment I’ve made for my home.

Aditya
3 out of 5 stars
Good cooling, but Samsung installation process is overpriced
Reviewed in India on 26 April 2026
Style Name: 3 Star 2026
Verified Purchase

The AC itself performs well and cools effectively, especially for a 2026 3-star model. No complaints on the product performance so far.

However, the installation experience was frustrating and unnecessarily expensive, in a metro city like Bangalore. There were multiple follow-ups required with the Samsung team, and it seemed like requests from Amazon were not being forwarded in a timely manner.

The bigger concern is the inflated pricing of installation materials. Basic items like white cement, which typically costs around ₹40/kg, were charged at nearly ₹150/kg—even when the full quantity wasn’t used. Copper pipe extensions were quoted at very high rates, with no transparency on actual specifications or usage. The same pattern applies to the outdoor unit stand, which was also priced significantly higher than market rates.

Installation is outsourced to third-party vendors, and billing is done via handwritten invoices, which raises further concerns about standardization and accountability.

Another surprise was the installation time—each of my two Samsung AC units took around 2 to 4 hours to complete.

Overall, paying ₹3,000–₹6,000 for a standard installation in a gated apartment—on a ₹30,000–₹35,000 AC—does not feel justified. The advertised ₹599 + GST installation claim is misleading given the actual costs involved.

Would strongly recommend better transparency, standardized pricing, and tighter control over third-party vendors to improve the customer experience

Think
1 out of 5 stars
Need to improve in air blasting process.
Reviewed in India on 19 April 2026
Verified Purchase

Here’s the updated version including your room size:

⸻

The cooling performance is not meeting expectations. My room size is 10×12 sq. ft., which should be easily handled by the AC. I also have a Panasonic AC in another room, and my brother uses a Daikin AC, so I have a direct comparison.

In this unit, the air seems to be blowing from above the fins, directing it toward the ceiling rather than into the room. Because of this, the airflow is not effective and the cooling feels weaker than expected.

In contrast, both Panasonic and Daikin ACs direct airflow from below the fins, pushing the air downward and allowing it to circulate properly across the room. This results in faster and more efficient cooling.

Overall, despite the small room size, the airflow design in this AC is not effective and needs improvement to match the performance of these brands.

Dont Purchase!!

After sales service is pathetic.

Our AC was installed on Saturday. On Monday, it stopped cooling. I called Blue Star customer care, and they raised a service ticket. However, when I contacted the service center, they refused to acknowledge or act on the ticket.

After around 30 follow-ups, the service center is still saying that the technician will come only when he is free. When I call the technician from my registered number, he does not pick up the call, but he does answer calls from unknown numbers.

Yesterday, when I called him from an unknown number, he picked up and asked me to send pictures of the AC. After some time, he said he would come that same day just to check it. I asked him, if he was only going to come and check it himself, why did he ask me for the pictures? He replied that he needed the images to determine which gas might be required.

I then asked him, if he already knows that the gas is low, why doesn’t he just bring the gas with him? He said he would come the next day with the gas. If he was planning to come the next day anyway, why did he lie about coming the same day?

And now, even on the promised day, he still hasn’t come.

Customer care doesn’t care at all about the technician. The service center has even blocked my number, saying that they currently have installation requests to complete, and only after finishing those will they look into my issue.

I kept आग्रह (insisting) and even ended up arguing with them, asking why my case cannot be treated as a priority. He kept repeating that they are not free. I raised my voice, and he casually replied, “Will shouting get the work done?”

I told him that being patient hasn’t helped either—I’ve been calling continuously for the last three days. After that, he started arguing with me and finally said, “We won’t do your work. Do whatever you can,” and then blocked my number.

I am now forced to suffer in extreme summer heat despite having paid for the AC, and there has been absolutely no resolution from your side.

Antony H.
3 out of 5 stars
Good cooling. WiFi/BT. Silent ODU. Slightly noisy IDU. Competitive price. Had installation issues.
Reviewed in India on 7 April 2026
Size: New Star Rated
Verified Purchase

This is an updated 2026 version of the AC and so I got the product manufactured in Jan 26. The original packaging is intact and was delivered in perfect condition.

But once the installation team came next day, the indoor unit copper pipe had leak. If the device is to be replaced, there are 2 options. Indoor unit had to be taken by Bluestar team and a new unit needs to arrive. Or this whole unit has to be replaced through Amazon itself. Both will take time and hence the team came and welded the copper pipe. Welding is usually done when copper pipes are to be joined. So this should be okay, but an issue with a new unit is not a happy experience for the customer.

Indoor unit leaks can happen in ACs. They are pressurized with air while shipping. Before installing this, air will be released so that service team know that indoor unit has leaks or not. Saw a recent review that another user had the SAME ISSUE which is disturbing. Either this model is not good, or Amazon is handling the packages badly, or they are selling second quality products. 800+ units were sold last month and only 14 reviews on Amazon. So there is also a possibility that we both were unlucky customers.

Coming to the features, the ODU is super silent than a 4 year old Panasonic 1 ton 4 star AC. Indoor unit is a bit noisier than the other one. But it is bearable. Plastic parts are not that strong. There is a tiny rattle of the AC flaps when the fan is set to full speed.

Cooling is good. Using this in a 250+ sq ft living room with L shape for which the ideal tonnage is 2 or more. But it cools the room decently. There are some hot spots and the room won't cool down to 24 degree since it is not sealed.

Remote is a bit bulky with round LCD screen. It looks good and functions well. There is WiFi connectivity and it is Alexa and Google Home compatible.

The AC features Horizontal swing as well unlike other 1.5 ton 3 star ACs. But the swing is either ON or OFF. There are no options to set it at a fixed position on the remote. So we have to look at the swing position and stop it at the desired position which is not convenient. Panasonic 1 ton (4 star) ACs have this function so that we can use the remote to move the flap to the desired location. Vertical flap in this model has full control of the swing as usual.

Warranty as per the service team is that it has 10 years compressor warranty, 5 years on parts like PCB, excluding plastics and remote. And one year comprehensive warranty. So Gas charging after one year will cost us. Any service done will also incur service charge until 5 years which seems okay. PCB is the costliest part in AC which is covered.

Installation charges came to Rs 1733, including 1500+GST service, rubber bush and white tape for AC ducting. Opting for external stand or extended copper pipes can shoot the price higher. Welding was part of warranty service.

Pricing is great on Amazon with card offers. If you have the time and patience to handle issues like this, go and purchase it. Otherwise opt from local shops. This is a decent product in terms of cooling.

Standard Installation charges (INR 1499 + GST as applicable) to be paid directly to brand technician at doorstep to avail installation. Installation will be provided by the Brand within 48 to 72 hours of delivery.

Standard installation service includes unboxing and installing the AC, connecting Outdoor unit and Indoor Unit with the standard wire/ pipe length provided with the product to the available power source, sealing the hole from the outside, conducting gas check, checking cooling performance and product demonstration. Please provide a ladder to the technician.

Any additional out of scope accessories and services, if required are chargeable as per the Brand's rate card and shall be paid directly to the technician. Such as Electrical cabling, drain piping, Outdoor stand for AC units, dismantling of existing AC units, Nitrogen testing to reuse old installed piping, etc. Applicable GST would be charged where applicable. Kindly check with the technician to confirm additional work or services required before installation commencement.
Extra copper pipe beyond 3m (already included in the box) will be chargeable at INR 850/- per meter.

LG Smart Inverter Split AC: Optimized for rapid chill and maximum power savings, the high-efficiency compressor delivers an ultra-reliable, quiet, and long-lasting cooling experience

Utkarsh

Definitely go for it!
Reviewed in India on 9 April 2026
Size: 1.5 T 3 Star-Dust Buster
Verified Purchase

The product is totally worth the money. Got the latest manufactured product with no damage. Cooling starts within 5 mins and is very good; the AC is also silent. The installation was done on the same day & technician did a great job. So if there's any issue with the installation for anyone, it doesn't reflect on the product's quality; it means the service guy isn't experienced in that area.

It's the most feature-loaded AC with the highest cooling capacity compared to other brands & with new star ratings, it is one of the best energy-efficient ACs too.

A 4-way air swing & a longer IDU would have been great because it'd have increased the airflow, but for small/medium rooms, it won't matter much. For larger rooms (150sqft+), it'll just take a few extra minutes to cool

The app experience is also good, with better UI and more features. Although the sleep profile feature they talk about is average because you can’t set multiple switch on/off timer (just 1) and this timer is not a part of sleep profile. It’s accessibility could have been better and it could have more things user can control like setting the exact time (rather than giving one hour span) you want the AC to turn on/off throughout the night (refer screenshot)

For the promotional 6 yrs warranty, I paid 588/- extra on the Panasonic website to claim it.

Recently Purchased 1.5ton 3 star AC on April 30 2026. Here are my observations

Pros:

• Fast and powerful cooling

• Low noise operation

• Good energy efficiency and power saving

• MirAI app support is very useful

• AC can be controlled from mobile remotely

• Electricity consumption tracking feature is very helpful

• Smart connectivity works smoothly using Wi-fi.

• Compact and premium indoor unit design

• Panasonic extended warranty offer is a big plus. 6yrs on PCB and 10yrs on Compressor!

Cons:

• Remote control size is too small

• Indoor unit supports only 2-way airflow, 4-way airflow would have improved cooling distribution

• Extra installation materials are very expensive

• Copper pipe/wire extension charges per meter are high.

• Additional electrical setup costs increase quickly beyond standard installation

Installation Experience:

• Installation quality was good overall

• Technicians completed the work properly

• Standard installation is fine

• Customers should ask for clear pricing before extra work starts

• Additional copper piping, wiring, drain pipe extension, stand, and 16A plug setup can significantly increase final cost

Final Verdict: Very good AC with excellent cooling, smart app features, and useful electricity monitoring. Apart from high extra installation costs and small remote size, overall experience has been very good.

Definitely worth considering. ⭐⭐⭐⭐✨

1. Nightmare Installation (7-Day Headache)

The installation process was an absolute disaster. It took 7 days just to get it set up. The first team that arrived was completely unprofessional; they messed up my brand-new wall and seemed to have no idea what they were doing. To make matters worse, I was charged ₹3,500 for the installation, which included a very cheap, low-quality stand. They even refused to install the unit on the wall as requested.

2. Extremely Poor Cooling

Even after the struggle of getting it installed, the performance is a huge letdown. It is marketed as a 1.5 Ton unit, but it doesn't feel like it at all. Even after running it all night, the room temperature doesn't even drop to 24°C. It just keeps running constantly without actually cooling the space.

3. Don't Trust the Hype

My advice: Do not buy this based on YouTube influencer reviews. It’s clear they are paid to promote it. This has been a total waste of money and a massive frustration.

Save your hard-earned money and look for a more reliable brand.

Standard Installation Charges to be paid directly to brand technician at doorstep to avail installation. This will be non-refundable if the installation is completed
Standard installation includes unboxing, mounting and installation of IDU & ODU with the copper wire and drain pipe connected to it. Demo of product and explaining the features.

Accessory charges: Extra copper Pipe with insulation - INR 1200+GST; Labour charge if copper pipe is supplied by customer - INR 300+GST;  Supply & Installation Of ODU Stand - INR 1000+GST; Labour charge if stand is provided by customer - INR 250+GST

Dismantling of older split AC - INR 900+GST; Drainpipe- INR 100+ GST per meter, Communication Cable - INR 150+GST per meter, Nitrogen Flushing - INR 600+ GST, Electrical wire - INR 150+GST; Vinyl roll - INR 180 per unit

For any enquiries/escalations please contact brand: 756788-4848/ 079-71414848 (Landline)/ WhatsApp: +91 7567884848; Email: customercare@jci-hitachi.com

Hitachi Split AC with Inverter Compressor delivers faster cooling and lower energy consumption. The variable-speed compressor intelligently adjusts its power based on the heat load, ensuring consistent and uninterrupted cooling. Powered by EEV Precision Cool Technology, it accurately monitors cooling requirements and regulates refrigerant flow for superior performance and enhanced efficiency
Capacity : 1.5 Ton AC suitable for medium sized rooms up to 150 sq. ft., delivering efficient cooling even at 54°C. Features 4‑Way Swing and 550 CFM IDU airflow for powerful, uniform cooling
Energy Rating: 3 Star Energy Efficiency | Annual Energy Consumption : 864.39 units | ISEER Value:4.3

Manufacturer Warranty : 1 year comprehensive warranty and a 10 years warranty on the inverter compressor Warranty to be claimed with Amazon Invoice. User Manual available at Brand Website. Warranty to be claimed with Amazon Invoice. User Manual available at Brand Website.

Condenser Coil: Built with 100% copper tubes for faster cooling, low maintenance, and long‑lasting durability. Features Nano Tech Ultra coating on the IDU, which protects against rust and corrosion for enhanced reliability.

Key Features: Operates at low noise level of 34 dBA for quiet comfort. Xpandable Plus Technology for flexible cooling performance. The 4‑Way Swing ensures uniform air distribution across the room. Features Ice Clean (Frost Wash Technology) for odour‑free, hygienic air, and Silent Air with Wave Blade Design for smooth and noise‑reduced airflow.

Special Features : 3 in 1 Smart View Display , Long Air throw upto 24m , advanced Octa Sensor Technology for intelligent cooling, and a Filter Clean Indicator for easy maintenance. Comes with an Anti‑Bacterial Mesh Filter to ensure cleaner air. Delivers reliable cooling even at temperatures up to 54°C.
Refrigerant Gas: R32 - Environmental Friendly - No Ozone Depletion Potential
Item Dimensions & Weight: IDU – 95cm x 29.4cm x 23cm (w x h x d), Outdoor : 75 cm X 55 cm X 29 cm (w x h x d), IDU: 10Kg, ODU: 24 Kg
Included In The Box: 1 Indoor Unit, 1 Outdoor Unit, Inter Connecting Copper Pipe of 3m length, 1 Remote

Brand new AC unusable due to technician's negligence — Zero after-sales support
Reviewed in India on 13 May 2026
Size: New star rated
Verified Purchase

Dear Buyers, Please Read

I Bought this AC on 1st May. Installation was done on 2nd May by Hitachi's authorized technician — and during installation itself, he broke the outdoor unit's protective net. He promised replacement in "a few days."

It's now been 11 days. No replacement. No follow-up call. No response from customer care. The technician doesn't pick up calls.

I'm sitting in 45°C NCR heat unable to use a brand new AC — not because of any product defect, but purely due to Hitachi's pathetic after-sales service. The broken net is a safety risk — debris can enter the running fan and damage the unit.

The AC itself is very Good no doubt, but if their service team can cause damage during installation and then ghost you completely, think twice before buying.

Raised complaint — still unresolved as of 13th May.

I recently purchased this new air conditioner, and it has completely exceeded my expectations. From the moment it was installed, the cooling performance has been outstanding. It cools the room quickly and maintains a consistent temperature even during extremely hot days, which is exactly what I was hoping for.

One of the standout features is how quiet it is. Unlike other AC units I’ve used in the past, this one operates almost silently, making it perfect for both daytime use and sleeping at night. The energy efficiency is another big plus—I’ve noticed a reduction in my electricity usage without compromising on performance.

The design is sleek and modern, blending well with the room’s decor. The remote control and smart features are very user-friendly, allowing easy adjustments to temperature, modes, and fan speed. Installation was smooth, and the build quality feels durable and reliable.

Overall, this air conditioner delivers excellent value for money. It’s powerful, efficient, quiet, and easy to use. I would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a dependable and high-performing AC unit.

Hitachi Heavy Duty Split AC with Inverter Compressor delivers faster cooling and lower energy consumption. The variable-speed compressor intelligently adjusts its power based on the heat load, ensuring consistent and uninterrupted cooling. Powered by EEV Precision Cool Technology, it accurately monitors cooling requirements and regulates refrigerant flow for superior performance and enhanced efficiency
Capacity : 1.5 Ton AC suitable for medium sized rooms up to 150 sq. ft., delivering efficient cooling even at 54°C. Features 4‑Way Swing and 600 CFM IDU airflow for powerful, uniform cooling
Energy Rating: 3 Star Energy Efficiency | Annual Energy Consumption : 897.16 units | ISEER Value:4.7

Manufacturer Warranty: 1‑year standard warranty, 10 years on the compressor, and 5 years on the controller. Brand warranty can be availed using the Amazon invoice. (Upgrade for a paid 5‑year comprehensive warranty, offering added benefits and extended protection at ₹299+GST *T&C apply)

Condenser Coil: Built with 100% copper tubes for faster cooling, low maintenance, and long‑lasting durability. Features Nano Tech Ultra coating on the IDU, which protects against rust and corrosion for enhanced reliability.

Key Features: Operates at low noise level of 37 dBA for quiet comfort. Hybrid Convertible and Xpandable Plus Technology for flexible cooling performance. The 4‑Way Swing ensures uniform air distribution across the room. Features Ice Clean (Frost Wash Technology) for odour‑free, hygienic air, and Silent Air with Wave Blade Design for smooth and noise‑reduced airflow.

Special Features : Bigger IDU - 1050 mm for robust cooling, Built‑in Wi‑Fi technology for smart control, 3 in1 Smart view Display, Long air throw upto 24m , advanced Octa Sensor Technology for intelligent cooling, and a Filter Clean Indicator for easy maintenance. Comes with an Anti‑Bacterial Mesh Filter to ensure cleaner air. Delivers reliable cooling even at temperatures up to 54°C.

Split AC with Inverter Compressor: Enjoy powerful cooling even at 60°C with a variable speed compressor that adapts to heat load. 8-in-1 Convertible Modes (up to 115%* capacity) deliver customized cooling and energy savings, while Wi-Fi enabled smart control lets you stay cool, comfortable, and connected—anytime, from anywhere.
Capacity: 1.5 Ton: Suitable For Medium Sized Rooms (Up To 150 Sq.Ft); Air Flow: 618 CFM, Cooling Capacity: 4700 W & Flawless Cooling Even At 55°C Surrounding Temprature

5 Star Energy Rating; Certified for High Energy Efficiency, with an Energy Consumption of 644.41 units per year and a high ISEER value of 5.65, Low Electricity Consumption without compromising on powerful cooling performance

Comprehensive Warranty Coverage: Enjoy worry-free ownership with a 1-year comprehensive warranty on the product, 10 years on Compressor and 5 years on PCB, ensuring unmatched durability and performance.

100% copper grooved tubes, condenser coil with Dual Gold Fin & NanoTek Coating ensures faster cooling, superior durability, and protection against rust, corrosion, and leakage for long-lasting performance.

Wi-Fi Smart Control with Geo Sensing: Control your AC anytime, anywhere via your smartphone. Geo sensing detects your location (within ~5 km) and pre-cools the room before you arrive, while Sleep Profile let you customize temperature settings through the night for personalized comfort and better energy savings.

Fast Cooling with Flexi Control & Self Clean: Enjoy powerful cooling even at 55°C with a heavy-duty compressor. Hybrid Mode delivers 30% faster cooling, while 8-in-1 Flexi Mode lets you adjust capacity for optimal comfort and energy savings. 4-step self-clean technology prevents dust, mold, and bacteria buildup, while powerful air throw cools rooms quickly and evenly.
Refrigerant Gas: Eco-friendly R32 gas with zero ozone depletion potential and 68% lower GWP compared to R410A

Split AC with inverter compressor: Variable speed compressor which adjusts cooling capacity depending on heat load. The convertible feature with 8 different cooling modes adjusts cooling performances ranging from 40%* to HC* to match different needs basis room size or occupancy, enhancing energy efficiency and providing personalized comfort with minimal effort.
Capacity (1.5 Ton): Suitable for medium sized rooms (120-170 sq ft); Airflow of 703 CFM; Cooling Capacity of 5100 W & Ambient operating Temperature: upto 55 degree Celsius with 4 way Swing.
Energy Rating: 5 Star. Annual Energy Consumption: 681.01 kWh. ISEER Value: 5.80
Manufacturer Warranty: 10 years on Compressor and 5 years on PCB. Brand Warranty can be availed using amazon invoice.

Copper Condenser Coil: Better cooling and requires low maintenance. Healthy Cooling: Equipped with PM0.1 Filter to provide clean air. Longer Heat Exchanger Life: Special ShieldBlu+ protection coating to prevent leakages.
Key Features- Stabilizer free operation with 100-290 V operating voltage range; Hidden Temperature Display; Noise Level: IDU - 34 (db) & ODU: 54 (db).

Special Feature: Premium Wi-Fi Inverter Smart Split AC, India's 1st Matter enabled RAC powered by MirAie. Dust Buster technology Auto cleans ODU coils after every 8 hours of running to provide steady cooling, better efficiency & longer life. 100% Copper Tubing helps in faster heat exchange. AI mode helps to maintain comfort conditioning & saves energy. With an ambient operating temperature of up to 55 deg.C and higher airflow, faster cooling is ensured even in extreme heat condition.
Refrigerant Gas: R32 – Environment Friendly - "Zero" Ozone Depletion Potential (ODP)

Santosh Kulkarni
5 out of 5 stars
Excellent Product and Smooth Installation Experience
Reviewed in India on 10 May 2026
Size: 1.5 Ton 5 Star_Dust Removal
Verified Purchase

I purchased this Panasonic AC from Dawntech Electronics on 8th May, it was delivered on 9th May, and installed on 10th May.

Before ordering and after ordering, I was quite anxious after reading several reviews about missing copper pipes, connecting cables, and defective units. Fortunately, my package included everything required for installation, and the unit was in perfect condition.

The installation experience was smooth overall. The technician contacted me within two hours of delivery. When I asked whether he would perform vacuuming during installation, he initially said it was not necessary and he doesnt have the machine at that moment, However, I informed him that vacuuming is a mandatory step even if it meant postponing the installation to the next day. After that, he agreed, returned the next day with a vacuum pump, and completed the installation professionally.

Installation charges were 1652 (1200 installation + 200 outdoor unit installation + 18% gst) , as I have bought things on my own instead of buying from the guy. Also I am from Hyderabad, if that helps.

As for the AC itself, it is an excellent product. It cools the room very quickly, operates quietly, and performs exactly as expected. The build quality and overall performance are impressive.

Ishtiyaq Husain
1 out of 5 stars
Just don’t buy it. You cannot trust it.
Reviewed in India on 11 March 2026
Size: 1.5 Ton 5 Star_Dust Removal
Verified Purchase

This is my experience with Panasonic 1.5 Ton 5 Star AC 2026 model in Mumbai.

Lest talk about the build quality, build quality is ok, indoor unit is big compare to other brands. Remote feels very cheap but it has led light. External unit looks and feels solid.

I bought it on 7th March from Amazon.

It was delivered today morning, 9th March.

I booked the installation for the next day. But I got a call from the installation technician. He asked if he could come today for installation.

I said ok.

The technician came around 2 PM and started the installation.

After installation was finished, he started the AC.

But it was not cooling.

He checked everything and then told me the unit is defective.

He said I need to contact Amazon.

I contacted Amazon support.

They said the same product is not available in their warehouse.

So the only option is return and refund.

I asked about the installation charges.

The technician said normally I don’t have to pay until installation is completed.

But in case of return, I have to pay the installation charges.

Amazon support told me they will reimburse the installation amount after the pickup is completed. But I have to share original bill from the installation technician.

I was not the only one.

The installation technician told me that today morning he installed another unit of the same AC and that one was also defective.

There was no gas in that unit.

I have attached the screenshot for entites exposed to home assistant via matter.

I would definitely not recommend this ac to anyone.

You may hear from people that it is an excellent AC and top quality.

That is true when the AC works.

But the problem is reliability.

When it works, it works very well.

But many times users get frustrated because of quality issues and poor service.

Update:

I have shared the original bill from service provider and now amazon denied the payment by saying you have no written proof. I told them I have call recording but amazon denied it

The service engineer was very friendly, polite, and patient. He explained everything clearly, including how to use and maintain the AC properly. The installation was done perfectly with neat finishing and proper setup.

Overall, a great product with excellent installation service. Very satisfied with Panasonic—highly recommended!

Perfect cooling partner
Reviewed in India on 5 July 2023

Verified Purchase

I recently purchased the Lloyd Split 1 Ton AC with a 4-star energy efficiency rating, and I must say, I am extremely satisfied with its performance. This AC unit has exceeded my expectations in terms of cooling capabilities and energy efficiency.

First and foremost, the cooling performance of this AC is outstanding. Within minutes of turning it on, it effectively cools down my room, creating a comfortable environment even during scorching summer days. The air circulation is impressive, and it evenly distributes cool air throughout the room, eliminating any hotspots.

What impressed me even more is its energy efficiency. With its 4-star rating, I was concerned about the impact on my electricity bills. However, I have noticed a significant reduction in energy consumption compared to my previous AC unit. This not only helps me save money but also contributes to reducing my carbon footprint. It's a win-win situation.

Additionally, the durability of this Lloyd AC is commendable. The unit feels solidly built, and the components are of high quality. I have been using it for several months now, and it shows no signs of wear and tear. I am confident that it will last for years to come, providing me with reliable cooling during each summer season.

One aspect that I particularly appreciate is how quiet this AC operates. The noise levels are minimal, allowing me to sleep peacefully or concentrate on my work without any distractions. This feature sets it apart from other AC units I have used in the past.

Lloyd has also equipped this AC with a range of useful features. The sleep mode is especially convenient, as it adjusts the temperature automatically during the night, ensuring a comfortable sleep while conserving energy. The timer settings allow me to program the AC to turn on or off at specific times, providing added convenience and energy savings.

Lastly, the air purification filters are a great addition. They help improve the air quality by capturing dust, allergens, and other particles, ensuring that the air I breathe is clean and fresh.

In conclusion, I highly recommend the Lloyd Split 1 Ton AC with its 4-star energy efficiency rating. Its excellent cooling performance, energy efficiency, durability, and quiet operation make it a standout choice. The additional features and air purification filters further enhance the overall experience. Investing in this AC unit has been a worthwhile decision, and I am confident that it will continue to meet my cooling needs for years to come.

Split AC with Inverter Compressor: Enjoy powerful cooling even at 55°C with a variable speed compressor that adapts to heat load. 8-in-1 Convertible Modes (up to 115%* capacity) deliver customized cooling, better energy savings, and all-day comfort.

3 Star Energy Rating; Energy Consumption of 889.95 units per year and a high ISEER value of 4.35, Low Electricity Consumption without compromising on powerful cooling performance

Comprehensive Warranty Coverage: Enjoy worry-free ownership with a 1-year comprehensive warranty on the product, 10 years on Compressor and 5 years on PCB, ensuring unmatched durability and performance

100% copper grooved tubes, condenser coil with Dual Gold Fin & NanoTek Coating ensures faster cooling, superior durability, and protection against rust, corrosion, and leakage for long-lasting performance.

Fast Cooling with Flexi Control: Enjoy powerful cooling even at 55°C with a heavy-duty compressor. Hybrid Mode delivers 30% faster cooling, while 8-in-1 Flexi Mode lets you choose from multiple capacities for the perfect balance of comfort and energy savings.

Self Clean with 4-Way Swing: 4-step self-clean technology prevents dust, mold, and bacteria buildup for healthier air and better performance, while 4-way swing ensures uniform cooling in every corner of the room.
Refrigerant Gas: Eco-friendly R32 gas with zero ozone depletion potential and 68% lower GWP compared to R410A

The AC turned out to be extremely poor in quality and started creating problems within a very short time. Cooling is terrible, the product quality feels very cheap, and it honestly looks like a defective or dummy unit.

I strongly feel that Amazon and Lloyd are working together to sell low-quality and dummy ACs to customers in the name of branded products. This is completely unacceptable and feels like a scam with customers who trust these big companies.

Even after raising complaints, there was no proper support or permanent solution provided. Very disappointing service and pathetic product quality.

I would never recommend anyone to buy a Lloyd AC from Amazon. Please save your money and avoid this product at all costs.

⭐ 1 Star — Fake Quality, Worst Product, Worst Service.

Now today is 6th of April, since there is no positive response from the service Centre. They are saying it's approved for the replacement but it may take time. 2 times called and they said they will check and revert back, but its not happened. I came from abroad for 45 days of annual leave. Now 20 days passed. And for these 15 days electricity bill also came more than double hope Due to the technical issue of the unit.

Not recommend going via online purchase. Because, if we purchase from shop, they will replace the unit immediately. Blue star have to consider immediate resolution for such cases.

Still waiting for service Centre response.

Pattern Name: 1.5 T 5 Star - Wifi with inbuilt Air Purifier (New Star Rating)

5 stars for 5 star AC, i bought directly from pansasonic website, with emi and discounts it cost be 44K.

Best cooling, wifi support, can be used through various home automation apps.

Cooling is good. The ODU has special feature of reverse fan movement for 3 mins every 8 hrs so the dust in the ODU radiators can be again pushed back to atmosphere,

Grey colour is unique and looks nice on the wall. Quite silent and the indicator light is not bright as in previous models. Has a super huge remote for all basic functions.

Its an AC does good ac work. Quality of copper pipe supplied with AC is good, installation guys from panasonic do a good job. Buying from panasonic website gets you free installation. Overall excellent product from panasonic.

It has features as a) 8 in 1 converter, b) auto clean function (with ice condensation on inner coils to remove dirt and etc. c) 4 way swing and extremely good air flow.

Amazon Customer
1 out of 5 stars
Installation service is dishonest and unprofessional.
Reviewed in India on 17 February 2026
Style Name: Split_1.5-3Star (Wifi)
Verified Purchase

Product quality is good, but installation service is dishonest and unprofessional.

The product itself is exactly as described and works well. However, the installation service was extremely disappointing and misleading.

We already had inbuilt piping at our location. The installation technician falsely claimed that the existing setup was completely unusable and could not be repaired by anyone. This was clearly not true.

When we informed him that we would get the existing setup checked and fixed independently, he still demanded installation charges despite doing absolutely no installation work at that point. This is highly unethical.

Additionally, we were pressured into paying an extra ₹2000 for additional pipes because we were misled into believing there was no other option. Later, we realized that this expense could have been avoided.

This feels like a deliberate attempt to extract extra money from customers through misinformation.

Recommendation: Buy the product if you want—it is good. But be extremely cautious with the installation service. Do not blindly trust the technician's assessment and consider getting a second opinion before agreeing to any additional charges.

Hitachi Split AC with Inverter Compressor delivers faster cooling and lower energy consumption. The variable-speed compressor intelligently adjusts its power based on the heat load, ensuring consistent and uninterrupted cooling. Powered by EEV Precision Cool Technology, it accurately monitors cooling requirements and regulates refrigerant flow for superior performance and enhanced efficiency
Capacity : 1 Ton AC suitable for small sized rooms ( up to 110 sq.ft), delivering efficient cooling even at 54°C. Features 4‑Way Swing and 410 CFM IDU airflow for powerful, uniform cooling
Energy Rating: 3 Star Energy Efficiency | Annual Energy Consumption : 632.61 units | ISEER Value: 4.30

Manufacturer Warranty: 1‑year standard warranty, 10 years on the compressor, and 5 years on the controller. Brand warranty can be availed using the Amazon invoice. (Upgrade for a paid 5‑year comprehensive warranty, offering added benefits and extended protection at ₹299+GST *T&C apply)

Condenser Coil: Built with 100% copper tubes for faster cooling, low maintenance, and long‑lasting durability. Features Nano Tech Ultra coating on the IDU, which protects against rust and corrosion for enhanced reliability.

Key Features: Operates at low noise level of 32 dBA for quiet comfort. Xpandable Plus Technology for flexible cooling performance. The 4‑Way Swing ensures uniform air distribution across the room. Features Ice Clean (Frost Wash Technology) for odour‑free, hygienic air, and Silent Air with Wave Blade Design for smooth and noise‑reduced airflow.

Special Features : Long Air throw upto 24m , advanced Octa Sensor Technology for intelligent cooling, and a Filter Clean Indicator for easy maintenance. Comes with an Anti‑Bacterial Mesh Filter to ensure cleaner air. Delivers reliable cooling even at temperatures up to 54°C.
Refrigerant Gas: R32 - Environmental Friendly - No Ozone Depletion Potential

I purchased this Hitachi 1 Ton 3-Star AC on April 18, 2026, and it has been nothing short of a nightmare since.

The Installation Saga:

It took 3 days just to get the unit installed. Once the technicians finally finished, the AC didn't even last one single day. It stopped working almost immediately.

Non-Existent Service Support:

I have been calling the service center repeatedly since April 28, 2026. For over a week, technicians kept canceling my service tickets without ever visiting my home or even calling.

Finally, after a lot of complaints, a technician showed up on May 7, 2026. He claimed there was an issue with the PCB but stated a "senior technician" would need to re-verify it. Since that visit, the request was—once again—canceled without any follow-up or visit. Mr. Ravi Kumar is the senior technician who is assigned and has been repeatedly cancelling the request without visit.

The Endless "48-Hour" Loop:

The customer care team is completely clueless. Every time I call, it’s like a repeat telecast: they have no idea what is happening and simply tell me to "please wait for 48 hours." Those 48 hours never end. On asking the customer care team to share the number of the technician or the service center, they only say we do not have any contact numbers and can’t help you. Exact words used “You don’t have any option now other than waiting, okay”

Verdict:

• Pathetic Product: Failed on day one.

• Pathetic Service Center: No coordination or accountability.

• Pathetic Technicians: Constant cancellations and zero resolution.

I am deeply repenting this purchase. Save your money, your time, and your sanity—stay away from Hitachi.

Maine Samsung ke 2 AC liye the ye soch ke ki brand trusted hai, lekin experience bilkul ulta nikla. Sirf 1 saal ke andar hi dono AC me problem aa gayi — ek ki cooling kharab ho gayi aur dusra to properly chalna hi band ho gaya.

Itna paisa kharch karke 2 AC liye aur dono ka haal same nikla, to quality pe serious doubt hota hai. Starting se hi cooling average thi, aur dheere-dheere performance aur girti gayi.

Service center ka experience bhi aur zyada frustrating hai. Complaint karne ke baad bas wait karte raho — technician late aate hain aur permanent solution nahi dete. Baar-baar same problem repeat hoti rehti hai.

Sach me bahut hi disappointing experience raha. Brand ke naam pe trust kiya tha, lekin dono AC fail ho gaye.

Took 2 ton unit and it has 7040 watts of cooling. It cools 330 sqft hall like a breeze. These unit are made in India variants and outdoor has at least 2 layer condenser. Indoor has really good air throw and thus it become little loud at max speed.

They did proper vacuum for more than 20 minutes and did leak checks and wrapped the pipes in proper manner. The Installation was done within the same day of delivery of the ac.

Overall liked the whole package of customer service and product.

Smart AC with Smart App: Blue Star Smart AC comes with an in-built Wifi module which ensures that you can use your AC from anytime, anywhere, truly the smart way. Voice Command Technology: Operate your AC with Voice Command using Amazon Alexa or Google Assistant. Switch On, set the temperature and enjoy comfort cooling through Voice Command Assistants.

Energy Rating : 5 Star | Annual Energy Consumption: 701.68 Units Per Year| ISEER Value: 5.63 | The star rating is as per new BEE guidelines effective from 1st Jan 2026.

4-Way Swing: Here, the Louvers can disperse air horizontally and vertically, making it easier to adjust the AC's airflow more accurately.

DigiQ Hepta Sensors: Blue Star's ACs are designed with 7 intelligent digital sensors that with its advanced microcontroller offer precise cooling even in extreme summer, optimise cooling in load variation and protect critical electronic components whilst in operation.
Voice Command Technology: Operate your AC with Voice Command using Amazon Alexa or Google Assistant. Switch On, set the temperature and enjoy comfort cooling through Voice Command Assistants.

Customised Sleep: You can adjust the temperature as well as the fan speed for every hour, over a 12-hour sleep period. You can also switch the AC OFF or keep it ON at the end of the sleep period, as per your comfort. You can personalise and save 4 different customised sleep preferences.

AI Pro+ : Blue Star's AI Pro+ uses an adaptive algorithm to monitor temperature changes and adjust compressor and fan speeds for optimal cooling and energy efficiency. Activate it easily via the Blue Star Smart App for unmatched comfort and savings.

Self Clean Technology: Prevents moisture buildup by drying the coils with maximum blower speed, stopping mold and bacteria growth. It ensures clean air, eliminates odours, and keeps the indoor unit hygienic for a healthier environment.

Paid ₹7200, AC still not repaired.bad after sales service by bluestar
Reviewed in India on 9 May 2026

Very disappointing experience with Blue Star AC service.

My 1.5 ton Blue Star AC was not cooling, so I registered a complaint through the official app. Since then, technicians have visited multiple times and collected charges repeatedly, but the AC is still not working. Till now, I have paid around ₹7200 through UPI, yet no proper diagnosis or permanent solution has been provided.

The technicians mainly visit, collect fees, and leave without resolving the issue. No proper follow-up is done, and the service request was even closed without fixing the AC.

On top of this, the staff behaviour has been very rude, unfriendly, and unprofessional. Customer concerns are not taken seriously, and calls are often ignored.

I expected better service and accountability from Blue Star and its service team. Strongly disappointed with the overall experience.

Hitachi Split AC with Inverter Compressor delivers faster cooling and lower energy consumption. The variable-speed compressor intelligently adjusts its power based on the heat load, ensuring consistent and uninterrupted cooling. Powered by EEV Precision Cool Technology, it accurately monitors cooling requirements and regulates refrigerant flow for superior performance and enhanced efficiency
Capacity : 1.5 Ton AC suitable for medium sized rooms up to 150 sq. ft., delivering efficient cooling even at 54°C. Features 4‑Way Swing and 600 CFM IDU airflow for powerful, uniform cooling
Energy Rating: 5 Star Best in class efficiency | Annual Energy Consumption : 690.72 units | ISEER Value: 5.60

Manufacturer Warranty: 1‑year standard warranty, 10 years on the compressor, and 5 years on the controller. Brand warranty can be availed using the Amazon invoice.(Upgrade for a paid 5‑year comprehensive warranty, offering added benefits and extended protection at ₹299+GST *T&C apply)

Condenser Coil: Built with 100% copper tubes for faster cooling, low maintenance, and long‑lasting durability. Features Nano Tech Ultra coating on the IDU, which protects against rust and corrosion for enhanced reliability.

Key Features: Operates at low noise level of 37 dBA for quiet comfort. Hybrid Convertible and Xpandable Plus Technology for flexible cooling performance. The 4‑Way Swing ensures uniform air distribution across the room. Features Ice Clean (Frost Wash Technology) for odour‑free clean air, and Silent Air with Wave Blade Design for smooth and noise‑reduced airflow.

Special Features : 3 in 1 Smart View Display , Long Air throw upto 24m , advanced Octa Sensor Technology for intelligent cooling, and a Filter Clean Indicator for easy maintenance. Comes with an Anti‑Bacterial Mesh Filter to ensure cleaner air. Delivers reliable cooling even at temperatures up to 54°C.
Refrigerant Gas: R32 - Environmental Friendly - No Ozone Depletion Potential
Item Dimensions & Weight: IDU – 105 cm X 29.4 cm X 25 cm (w x h x d), Outdoor : 80 cm X 64 cm X 29.8 cm (w x h x d), IDU: 11.4 Kg, ODU: 31.5 Kg
Included In The Box: 1 Indoor Unit, 1 Outdoor Unit, Inter Connecting Copper Pipe of 3m length, 1 Remote

ATHIRA
1 out of 5 stars
Absolute Nightmare - Stuck with a 50kg Paperweight and Zero Support
Reviewed in India on 7 May 2026
Style Name: Split_1.5-5Star
Verified Purchase

I am writing this review to warn others about the disastrous after-sales and return experience with this AC. It has been over 20 days since delivery, and the unit is still sitting in its box, uninstalled.

The Issues:

• Zero Installation Support: I have called Amazon and the brand's toll-free numbers multiple times over the last three weeks. Despite numerous promises, no technician has shown up.

• Contradictory Return Policy: When I finally gave up and asked for a return, Amazon told me I had to ship the product back myself.

• Logistical Impossible: This unit weighs over 50kg. I have contacted every major courier service, and none of them will accept a shipment of this weight from an individual.

Final Verdict:

I am now stuck with an expensive, heavy product that I cannot use and cannot return. Both the service provider and Amazon have failed to provide a basic solution. Save yourself the stress and avoid buying heavy appliances here if you expect any form of installation or return reliability. Totally dissatisfied

Hitachi Split AC with Inverter Compressor delivers faster cooling and lower energy consumption. The variable-speed compressor intelligently adjusts its power based on the heat load, ensuring consistent and uninterrupted cooling. Powered by EEV Precision Cool Technology, it accurately monitors cooling requirements and regulates refrigerant flow for superior performance and enhanced efficiency
Capacity : 2 Ton AC suitable for small sized rooms ( up to 200 sq.ft), delivering efficient cooling even at 54°C. Features 4‑Way Swing and 600 CFM IDU airflow for powerful, uniform cooling
Engery Rating : 3 Star Energy Efficiency | Annual Energy Consumption : 1140.91 units | ISEER Value: 4.30

Manufacturer Warranty: 10 years on Compressor and 5 years on PCB. Brand Warranty can be availed using amazon invoice. Warranty to be claimed with Amazon Invoice. User Manual available at Brand Website.

Condenser Coil: Built with 100% copper tubes for faster cooling, low maintenance, and long‑lasting durability. Features Nano Tech Ultra coating on the IDU, which protects against rust and corrosion for enhanced reliability.

Key Features: Operates at low noise level of 37 dBA for quiet comfort. Xpandable Plus Technology for flexible cooling performance. The 4‑Way Swing ensures uniform air distribution across the room. Features Ice Clean (Frost Wash Technology) for odour‑free clean air, and Silent Air with Wave Blade Design for smooth and noise‑reduced airflow.

Special Features : Long Air throw upto 24m , advanced Octa Sensor Technology for intelligent cooling, and a Filter Clean Indicator for easy maintenance. Comes with an Anti‑Bacterial Mesh Filter to ensure cleaner air. Delivers reliable cooling even at temperatures up to 54°C.
Refrigerant Gas: R32 - Environmental Friendly - No Ozone Depletion Potential
Item Dimensions & Weight : IDU – 95 cm X 29.4 cm X 23.5 cm (w x h x d), Outdoor : 80 cm X 64 cm X 29.8 cm (w x h x d), IDU: 10 Kg, ODU: 34.9 Kg
Included In The Box: 1 Indoor Unit, 1 Outdoor Unit, Inter Connecting Copper Pipe of 3m length, 1 Remote

Reviewed in India on 27 April 2026
Size: New Star Rated (Non-Wifi)
Verified Purchase

I recently purchased a Carrier air conditioner through Amazon, and the technician visited my home for installation. The air conditioner is functioning very well after installation, and I am satisfied with the product performance. However, the overall experience was impacted by the delay, as it took more than a week after raising the complaint for the installation to be completed.

Additionally, I paid INR 6,100 for installation charges, AC stand, and 3 meters of additional piping. This payment was made only after the technician assured me that a proper bill would be provided, as I was not comfortable paying a cash amount without documentation. Despite this assurance, I have still not received the bill. This is a major concern, and I request that the invoice be shared at the earliest.

While the product performance is good, timely installation and proper billing documentation are essential for a satisfactory customer experience.

Best Regards

Arvind Jha , Hyderabad , India

abhay
5 out of 5 stars
I think for 34 k it's pretty good 😊
Reviewed in India on 16 May 2026
Size: New star rated
Verified Purchase

Cooling is excellent and air throw is very strong. Outdoor unit makes slight noise but overall both indoor and outdoor units are quite silent during normal operation.

A few important things buyers should know before purchase:

- Outdoor stand is not compulsory if you can safely install the outdoor unit on a terrace/floor area.

- Company claims around 10 ft pipe length, but usable length feels closer to 7–8 ft.

- Outdoor stand is not included. Local stand costs around ₹400–500, company stand around ₹1000.

- Extra copper pipe from company costs around ₹400 per foot.

- Installation took around 2–3 hours.

Very important:

Please ask the technicians for proper vacuum pumping during installation. Many installers skip this unless specifically asked.

Also:

- Install a stabilizer. This is an inverter AC with PCB electronics and voltage fluctuations can damage it.

- Buy the additional 5-year comprehensive warranty (around ₹353 in my case). Worth it for long-term peace of mind.

- Indoor wire is not included, so use a good-quality thick wire.

- Use braided drain/gas pipe instead of cheap normal pipe.

Other observations:

- No water leakage, bad smell, or gas leakage issues.

- Copper condenser with double-row condenser setup.

- Cooling performance is excellent.

- Display is slightly dim but works fine.

- No Wi-Fi features.

- Service response and technicians were good in my area, but monitor the installation carefully.

- Drilling charges were not taken, but cleaning after installation was not done.

Overall, feels worth the price. LG and Hitachi both seem like good options.

Great AC and Helpful Hitachi Support – Watch Out for Shady Technicians!

The Hitachi AC itself is absolutely brilliant—it cools the room instantly, runs quietly, and the product is highly recommended. However, be careful during the initial setup. ​When I refused to pay, this technician actually went ahead and cancelled the installation request raised by Amazon. Instead of giving in, I bypassed them completely and raised a fresh installation request directly with Hitachi.

I ask Hitachi Outdoor unit Stand Cost and it is just 1000 INR, He was trying to sell me stand that costs 5500/- .

The same supervisor was assigned to my ticket, but after hearing what happened, he immediately corrected the situation and sent a completely different installation guy. This new technician was highly professional and easily mounted the AC on my existing old stand with zero issues, saving me ₹5,500. Great product, but stand your ground if a field worker tries to force expensive accessories on you!

Swapnil
5 out of 5 stars
Good Product
Reviewed in India on 17 April 2026
Verified Purchase

IFB produces good-quality products that look and feel durable.

This air conditioner is no exception. It is built for long life.

The ODU is as large as a 2-ton unit. (The IFB technician mentioned this multiple times—“galti se 2-ton ka bhej diya hai” 😂).

Cooling is excellent.

Airflow is very good and reaches a long distance.

It cools my 180 sq. ft. room gradually at 0.6-ton capacity (C5 mode) and maintains the temperature afterwards.

The new 2026 remote control is nice. It looks like an extended version of an old Nokia phone.

Installation was hassle-free; I didn’t mind helping them. (I had to lift the ODU from one side since he was alone, and the installation spot was a bit tricky.)

I bought my own stand for the ODU, so the total installation cost was ₹1,846 (₹1,416 [₹1,200 + GST for standard installation] + ₹350 for ODU stand fitting + ₹80 for tape).

Overall, it was a great deal for me considering the total price I paid—₹31,331, including installation.

Compared to other products in the market with similar features and build quality, this one feels like a solid choice.

Notes to IFB: Improve your service tracking and transparency. Develop the website to be more customer-centric, enhance the UI, and present warranty details more clearly.

Reviewed in India on 23 April 2026

​I was excited to be one of the first to buy this newly launched Whirlpool AC (purchased April 15, 2026), but the experience has been a nightmare.

​After receiving the unit on April 21st and having it installed on the 22nd, the AC immediately displayed an E6 Communication Error. I called Whirlpool service, and to their credit, the engineer arrived quickly. However, upon deep inspection and unscrewing the indoor unit, we discovered the internal body was damaged and the PCB was faulty.

​It is deeply disappointing to pay ₹41k for a premium product only to receive a damaged unit. If you are looking at this new model, be very careful and insist on a thorough internal check. I am now stuck with a defective product right in the middle of summer.

Lloyd Wi-Fi Split Designer AC with Inverter Compressor: AC with variable speed heavy duty compressor which automatically adjusts power depending on desired room temperature, expandable up to 115% capacity, adjustable with 6 cooling modes through remote control & Havells One App to operate in different capacities for different cooling needs. Energy Efficient with Low Noise Operation, Smart & Elegant design to suit your office & home requirements / interiors / décor
Capacity: 1.5 ton suitable for medium to large size rooms (Up to 170 square feet)

Golden Fins Evaporator & Copper Condenser Coils: Ensures better cooling performance, require low maintenance and enhances durability of the product

Key Features: Smart Sliding Fascia, Find Me & Miss Me (AI Modes for Direct & Deflected Air Throw), Absence Detection & Presence Detection, all this through its I.N.D.R.I Sensor Technology. Shower Cooling, Waterfall Heating & 15m Long Air Throw through its Dual Louver, In-Built Air Purifier, 6 in 1 Expandable that Cools @ 60°C ambient temperature.

Special Features: Mood Lighting (also available in standby mode), Temperature & IAQ Based Ambi-Lighting, Direct Voice Command (No Remote or Data or Wi-Fi or Smart Phone or Smart Devices required to operate the AC), Door Open Alert, High CO2 Alert, Anti-Corrosion Coating, Rapid Cooling (18°C in 30 seconds*), Precision Control Smart 4-Way Swing, Premium Remote Handset with I-Feel Sensor & Motion Sensor, Blow Function, Stabilizer Free Operation (100V to 300V), 100% Inner Grooved Copper Tubes, Auto Restart on restoration of power Noise Level: IDU - 30 (dB) & ODU - 57 (dB)
Refrigerant: R32 Refrigerant has been used which is environment friendly and has “No Ozone Depletion Potential” and “Low Global Warming Potential”
IDU Dimension (L x B x H) in cm: 92 x 21.6 x 32.3 having 11.9 kg net weight and ODU Dimension (L x B x H) in cm: 89.8 x 36.3 x 59.3 having 28.6 kg net weight

rohit

Great Cooling, But Installation Could Be Better
Reviewed in India on 16 May 2025
Size: Old Star Rated
Verified Purchase

I purchased an IFB AC and overall, I’m quite satisfied with its performance. The indoor unit fitting was done very well – neat, professional, and the design looks premium. Cooling is excellent across all capacities – whether it’s 0.6 ton, 0.8 ton, 1 ton, 1.2 ton, or 1.5 ton. You can feel the cooling almost instantly.

However, the outdoor unit installation was not up to the mark. It seemed a bit rushed and not properly aligned. Also, the full connection was not completed during the initial installation, which caused a slight delay in usage.

Performance-wise, the AC is superb, but IFB should work on improving their installation service.

मैंने IFB का AC खरीदा है और इसके परफॉर्मेंस से मैं काफी संतुष्ट हूं। इंडोर यूनिट की फिटिंग बहुत अच्छी और प्रोफेशनल तरीके से की गई थी। कूलिंग भी जबरदस्त है – चाहे 0.6 टन हो, 0.8 टन, 1 टन, 1.2 टन या 1.5 टन, सभी यूनिट्स बहुत अच्छी ठंडक देती हैं।

हालांकि, आउटडोर यूनिट की फिटिंग थोड़ी कमजोर रही। इंस्टॉलेशन पूरा नहीं किया गया था और कनेक्शन अधूरा छोड़ दिया गया, जिससे थोड़ी परेशानी हुई।

कुल मिलाकर, AC की परफॉर्मेंस बहुत अच्छी है, लेकिन IFB को अपनी इंस्टॉलेशन सेवा में सुधार करना चाहिए।

Split AC with inverter compressor: Variable speed compressor which adjusts cooling capacity depending on heat load. 3-STEPS FILTRATION SYSTEM: It helps reduce up to 99.8% of harmful bacteria and keeps your home air healthier. With dust, antibacterial filter, and PM2.5 filter. This 1.5-ton air conditioner can clean up even the tiniest pollution and dust particles surrounding in air.

AUTOMATIC ADJUSTABLE ROOM TEMPERATURE: With the I-feel remote control sensor you can select your ideal settings and your air conditioner will adjust automatically as per your desired temperature to keep the room always cool.

NOISE-FREE EXPERIENCE WITH THE INVERTER TECHNOLOGY: This ensures a stable temperature, quieter cooling, and much less vibration and noise while the air conditioner is functioning.

Standard Installation charges (INR 1499 + GST as applicable) to be paid directly to brand technician at doorstep to avail installation. Installation will be provided by the Brand within 48 to 72 hours of delivery.

Standard installation service includes unboxing and installing the AC, connecting Outdoor unit and Indoor Unit with the standard wire/ pipe length provided with the product to the available power source, sealing the hole from the outside, conducting gas check, checking cooling performance and product demonstration. Please provide a ladder to the technician.

Any additional out of scope accessories and services, if required are chargeable as per the Brand's rate card and shall be paid directly to the technician. Such as Electrical cabling, drain piping, Outdoor stand for AC units, dismantling of existing AC units, Nitrogen testing to reuse old installed piping, etc. Applicable GST would be charged where applicable. Kindly check with the technician to confirm additional work or services required before installation commencement.
Extra copper pipe beyond 3m (already included in the box) will be chargeable at INR 850/- per meter.
Our service expert will capture the device photos before and after the service, as required to capture proof of service completion.
Brand contact details: Customer Helpline: +91 829-123-8800, Email: support@cruiseac.com

For units installed by entities outside of Brand's service network, warranty repairs for defects attributed to installation may be charged by the Brand’s service partner. Please reach out to Brand to know more about the nearest authorized service partner and warranty eligibility.

Split AC with inverter compressor: Variable tonnage technology for faster cooling that adjusts power depending on cooling requirement. With VarioQool Convertible 4-in-1, you get flexibility to increase or decrease cooling capacity as per requirements.
Capacity (1 Ton): Suitable for small sized rooms (up to 110 sq.ft.) ; Cooling Capacity: 3440W ; Ambient Temperature: 48 ℃ with 2-Way Auto Air Swing

Energy Rating : 3 Stars - Best in class efficiency | Annual Energy Consumption: 604.99 Units per year | ISEER Value: 4.41 (Please Refer Energy Label). The star rating is as per New BEE guidelines valid until Dec 2027
Manufacturer Warranty: 1 Year Comprehensive Warranty on the Product, 1 Year on PCB, 10 Years on Compressor (T&C)
Condenser Coil: Copper Coil (Better cooling and requires low maintenance) with Rust-O-Shield Blue technology: Prevents from rust & corrosion; Increases durability for un-interrupted cooling.
Key Features: Stabilizer free operation within 145-285 voltage range; Convertible 4-in-1 cooling modes; Noise Level: IDU - 36 (db) & ODU – 58 (db)

Special Features: 7-in-1 with PM 2.5 Air Filters, 100% Hi Grooved Copper Condenser, Rust-O-shield Paint Protection, 4 Fan Speed Modes, Smart Diagnosis System, Magic LED Display, Wireless LED Remote, Auto Blow & Clean, 2 way Auto Airflow
Refrigerant Ggas: R32 Environmental friendly gas with no ozone depletion potential
Item Dimensions & Weight: Indoor Unit (WxDxH) - 80x23x29.5 cms, Outdoor Unit (WxDxH) - 78x24.1x55.7 cms; Net Weights: IDU 9.3 kg, ODU 23 kg

Included in the box: 1 Indoor Unit, 1 Outdoor Unit, 1 Remote, 1 Inter connecting cable 11.48 feet, 1 Inter connecting pipe 9.84 feet, 2 Batteries ; Note: Brand Warranty can be availed using amazon invoice | User manual can be accessed from brand website

Somesh Sharma
5 out of 5 stars
Good AC with a good price point and efficient cooling even at 26 degrees.
Reviewed in India on 3 June 2026
Size: 1.0T 3 Star ’26 (New Star Rating)
Verified Purchase

Okay, okay, here is the review. Received it a few days ago, the installation person called the next day and was very good in nature and helpful overall. Used a vacuum to properly install the air conditioner, and the air conditioner was installed. Now using the product for a week. I have a 110 sq. ft. room on the top floor, and it gets heated like an oven. This air conditioner I turn on at evening after office hours when my room is still hot. I set it to 26 degrees and the fan to high. It cools my room in merely 15 minutes. At night, even in 26 degrees, I feel very cool and comfortable. I was very skeptical of the brand, but Cruise AC has proved to be a good investment, and I hope I can recommend it further for the coming years. I will use it for a month and buy another 2 units because of the price and efficiency. The unit works silently and has a bright display with good features. The OD unit looks durable, and the remote has various features that sometimes don't even come in 1.5-ton A/Cs.

Amazon Customer
1 out of 5 stars
Dishonest Service & Poor Performance - Do Not Buy!
Reviewed in India on 15 May 2026
Size: New Star Rated +Wifi (6 IN 1 Convertible)
Verified Purchase

I am writing this as a genuine warning to other buyers. This has been a terrible experience from start to finish.

The Installation Trap:

Before purchasing, the product page stated "Free Installation." I even went a step further and called customer care to confirm this before the technicians arrived, and they assured me it was free. However, as soon as the installation was finished, the stance changed completely. I was told it was a paid service. I was charged ₹1,800 for the labor and a total of ₹3,000 including other equipment charges. This is blatant misinformation.

The Product Performance:

Even if the installation had been free, the AC itself is not worth it. The cooling functions are not good and it has failed to meet basic expectations. The performance is weak and does not justify the price of the unit, let alone the extra ₹3,000 I had to pay.

Final Verdict:

The company is misleading customers regarding service costs and delivering a subpar product. Save yourself the headache and the extra money—look for a different brand.

Hitachi Split AC with Inverter Compressor delivers faster cooling and lower energy consumption. The variable-speed compressor intelligently adjusts its power based on the heat load, ensuring consistent and uninterrupted cooling. Powered by EEV Precision Cool Technology, it accurately monitors cooling requirements and regulates refrigerant flow for superior performance and enhanced efficiency
Capacity : 1.5 Ton AC suitable for medium sized rooms up to 150 sq. ft., delivering efficient cooling even at 54°C. Features 4‑Way Swing and 550 CFM IDU airflow for powerful, uniform cooling
Energy Rating: 3 Star Energy efficiency | Annual Energy Consumption : 864.39 | ISEER Value: 4.30
Manufacturer Warranty: 1 year Comprehensive and 5 years on Compressor Warranty to be claimed with Amazon Invoice. User Manual available at Brand Website.

Condenser Coil: Built with 100% copper tubes for faster cooling, low maintenance, and long‑lasting durability. Features Nano Tech Ultra coating on the IDU, which protects against rust and corrosion for enhanced reliability.

Key Features: Operates at low noise level of 34 dBA for quiet comfort. Xpandable Plus Technology for flexible cooling performance. The 4‑Way Swing ensures uniform air distribution across the room. Features Ice Clean (Frost Wash Technology) for odour‑free, hygienic air, and Silent Air with Wave Blade Design for smooth and noise‑reduced airflow.

Special Features : Built‑in Wi‑Fi technology for smart control, 3 in 1 Smart View Display , Long Air throw upto 24m , advanced Octa Sensor Technology for intelligent cooling, and a Filter Clean Indicator for easy maintenance. Comes with an Anti‑Bacterial Mesh Filter to ensure cleaner air. Delivers reliable cooling even at temperatures up to 54°C.
Refrigerant Gas: R32 - Environmental Friendly - No Ozone Depletion Potential
Item Dimensions & Weight: IDU – 95cm x 29.4cm x 23cm (w x h x d), Outdoor : 75 cm X 55 cm X 29 cm (w x h x d), IDU: 10Kg, ODU: 24 Kg
Included In The Box: 1 Indoor Unit, 1 Outdoor Unit, Inter Connecting Copper Pipe of 3m length, 1 Remote

Split AC with inverter compressor: Variable speed compressor which adjusts power depending on heat load. Convertible / adjustable with 5 cooling modes through remote control to operate in different tonnages for different cooling needs
Capacity: 1.5 ton Suitable for medium sized rooms (111 to 150 sq ft); Ambient Temperature: 52⁰C.
Energy Rating: 3 Star - Best In Class Energy Efficient. Annual Energy Consumption: 900.94 kWh/year; ISEER Value: 4.30
Manufacturer Warranty: 1 Year Comprehensive Warranty on the Product, 10 Years Warranty on Inverter Compressor, 5 Year Warranty on PCB

Copper Condenser : The copper condenser ensures superior heat transfer while minimizing maintenance needs. Its rust- and corrosion-resistant properties enhance durability, providing uninterrupted cooling.
Key Features: 5 Adjustable Cooling Modes, Hidden Display; Wide Operating Range voltage range, LCD Remote, Long Air Throw.
Special Features: Anti Dust Filter, Anti Freeze Thermostat, Hidden Display, Sleep Mode, Gas Leak Detection,Memory Restart, 5 fan speed levels, 2 way air swing
Refrigerant Gas: R32 - Environmental Friendly - No Ozone Depletion Potential
Product Dimensions: IDU: 92.5 x 32 x 24 cm (WXHXD), ODU: 83.5 x 59.5 x 30 cm (WXHXD)

Included In The Box: 1 Indoor Unit, 1 Outdoor Unit, 1 Interconnecting Cable of 9.84 ft (Indoor to Outdoor), 1 Set (2nos) Interconnecting Pipe (Copper) of 9.84 ft for Indoor to Outdoor Connection, 4 Outdoor Vibration Pad, 1 Remote, 2 AAA Remote Battery, 1 Indoor Mounting Plate, Plastic Sleeve+Screw for Indoor Mounting Plate. Rahul D.
1 out of 5 stars
Pathetic installation and service
Reviewed in India on 26 May 2024
Set name: 183V Vectra CAW
Verified Purchase

I bought this AC with a belief that it is a TATA brand and expected a great product. Within 1 week of installation, the AC wasn’t working well and started to give out hissing sound when it was turned on. On surfing the internet, I was shocked to see the issue was due to refrigerant leak. Shocked to see such a health hazard to which me and family including my 3 year old kid was exposed to. All I can relate to is a faulty installation at first place.

Then the usual process started. Submitted a complaint and got a response that it will be rectified in 24-72hrs. Even after 72hrs, there is no response. Once again, I contacted the customer care and they provided me with the manager of authorized service center for Voltas. He never picks the calls nor he was able to send me the technician to look into my AC.

And at last he said he will send a technician first thing in the morning and I began to wait. No one turned up. As I was traveling the next day, I was literally pleading and begging to have a technician. But it fell on deaf ears only. I had to cancel my travel, only to wait for no response again.

Again it started to same cycle of calling the manager of the service center who said he will send the technician first thing in the Sunday morning. Had to wait the whole day to see no one bothered to service my AC. Such a pathetic customer service and I don’t understand why a brand like Voltas have given authorizations to do service to some third rated guys as Urban company guys are way better than these.

When am posting this, it has been around 6 days since my initial complaint and even escalating to Voltas customer care, they don’t seem to bother. I never expected this kind of attitude from a reputed brand like TATA Group.
